Objects.Name: [Module] Comet Timer
Objects.Notes: Creates a timer layout once activated.

Classes.Notes: An object that creates a timer when SW_A is activated.

Obj_arg0.Name: Timer
Obj_arg0.Description: How long the timer is in seconds.

Obj_arg1.Name: Don't Kill Player?
Obj_arg1.Description: If set, the player will not lose a life upon the timer ending.

Obj_arg2.Name: Loop Timer?
Obj_arg2.Description: If set, when the timer expires, it will loop back to its initial time.

Obj_arg3.Name: Initialize SW_DEAD?
Obj_arg3.Description: If set, the timer will trigger SW_DEAD once expired.

Obj_arg4.Name: Use Bomb Timer Layout?
Obj_arg4.Description: If set, the bomb timer layout will be displayed instead of the ususal one.

SW_DEAD.Description: Activates once the timer expires if Obj_arg3 is set.
